title: Totem Bot
description: A bot to practice your crystal pvp and mace pvp on!
body: Tired of trying to get better at Crystal PvP but you can't because your ping is garbage? Well look no further! Introducing Totem Bot! A bot that can help you get better at hit crystaling! There are two bots: 1. Totem Bot(this bot just stands around and automatically re-totems) ![Totem Bot Easy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OaaBmiqG/images/97df8a3d41d6fe61735dc2e3971152ab9792dc14.gif) 2. Totem Bot Move(this bot moves around and attacks you when you try to crystal him making it harder to hit crystal) Enjoy! Hope this makes you better at CPVP! **Warning! These bots cannot be killed with brute force! You have to use a /kill command to remove them**
